intro: Compare climate risk between ACT Remainder - Paddys River, Australian Capital Territory and ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to ACT Remainder - Paddys River (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is ACT Remainder - Paddys River or ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Paddys River has a flood risk score of 38/100, while ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Paddys River scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in ACT Remainder - Paddys River or ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek has a lower overall climate risk score.
